# ciphertrust_aws_keys_list (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve a list of AWS keys. Supply a 'filters' map of key:value pairs matching the CipherTrust Manager API query parameters for listing AWS keys (e.g. region, alias, keyid). Use 'limit=-1' to return more than 10 matches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all AWS keys (up to default limit of 10)
data "ciphertrust_aws_keys_list" "all_keys" {}

# List AWS keys filtered by region
data "ciphertrust_aws_keys_list" "keys_by_region" {
  filters = {
    region = "ap-south-2"
  }
}

# List AWS keys filtered by alias
data "ciphertrust_aws_keys_list" "keys_by_alias" {
  filters = {
    alias = "my-key"
  }
}

# List all AWS keys (no limit)
data "ciphertrust_aws_keys_list" "all_keys_no_limit" {
  filters = {
    limit = "-1"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filters` (Map of String) A map of key:value pairs matching CipherTrust Manager API query parameters for listing AWS keys.

### Read-Only

- `keys` (Attributes List) List of AWS keys matching the given filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))
- `matched` (Number) Total number of keys returned by the API for the given filters.

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `auto_rotate` (Boolean) True if AWS autorotation is enabled on the key.
- `auto_rotation_period_in_days` (Number) Rotation period in days.
- `aws_param` (Attributes) AWS key parameters returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--aws_param))
- `cloud_name` (String) AWS cloud.
- `created_at` (String) Date the key was created.
- `external_accounts` (Set of String) Other AWS accounts that have access to this key.
- `id` (String) Terraform ID (composite of region and AWS key ID for aws_key).
- `key_admins` (Set of String) Key administrators - users.
- `key_admins_roles` (Set of String) Key administrators - roles.
- `key_id` (String) CipherTrust Manager Key ID.
- `key_material_origin` (String) Key material origin.
- `key_source` (String) Source of the key.
- `key_type` (String) Key type.
- `key_users` (Set of String) Key users - users.
- `key_users_roles` (Set of String) Key users - roles.
- `kms_id` (String) ID of the KMS.
- `kms_name` (String) Name of the KMS. On input this accepts a KMS name or ID; the returned value is the KMS name.
- `labels` (Map of String) A list of key:value pairs associated with the key.
- `local_key_id` (String) CipherTrust Manager key identifier of the external key.
- `local_key_name` (String) CipherTrust Manager key name of the external key.
- `multi_region` (Boolean) True if this is a multi-region key.
- `multi_region_configuration` (Attributes) Multi-region configuration for the key. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration))
- `next_rotation_date` (String) Date when auto-rotation will happen next.
- `policy_template_tag` (Map of String) AWS key tag for an associated policy template.
- `region` (String) AWS region the key belongs to.
- `rotated_at` (String) Time when this key was rotated by a scheduled rotation job.
- `rotated_from` (String) CipherTrust Manager key ID of the key this key was rotated from.
- `rotated_to` (String) CipherTrust Manager key ID which this key was rotated to.
- `rotation_status` (String) Rotation status of the key.
- `synced_at` (String) Date the key was synchronized.
- `updated_at` (String) Date the key was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--keys--aws_param"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.aws_param`

Read-Only:

- `alias` (Set of String) Alias(es) of the key.
- `arn` (String) Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the key.
- `aws_custom_key_store_id` (String) AWS Custom Key Store ID associated with the key. Populated for XKS and CloudHSM keys.
- `creation_date` (String) Date the key was created in AWS.
- `current_key_material_id` (String) AWS key material ID that is currently active for this key. Populated for EXTERNAL-origin keys.
- `customer_master_key_spec` (String) Whether the KMS key contains a symmetric key or an asymmetric key pair.
- `deletion_date` (String) Date the key is scheduled for deletion. Populated only when pending deletion.
- `description` (String) Description of the AWS key.
- `enabled` (Boolean) True if the key is enabled in AWS.
- `encryption_algorithms` (List of String) Encryption algorithms supported by the key. Populated for asymmetric keys.
- `expiration_model` (String) Expiration model for EXTERNAL-origin keys.
- `key_id` (String) AWS key ID.
- `key_manager` (String) Key manager (e.g. CUSTOMER).
- `key_rotation_enabled` (Boolean) True if AWS automatic key rotation is enabled.
- `key_state` (String) State of the key in AWS (e.g. Enabled, Disabled, PendingDeletion).
- `key_usage` (String) Specifies the intended use of the key.
- `mac_algorithms` (List of String) MAC algorithms supported by the key. Populated for HMAC keys.
- `multi_region` (Boolean) True if this is a multi-region key.
- `multi_region_configuration` (Attributes) Multi-region configuration for primary and replica keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration))
- `next_rotation_date` (String) Date of the next scheduled automatic rotation in AWS.
- `origin` (String) Origin of the key material (e.g. AWS_KMS, EXTERNAL).
- `policy` (String) Resulting AWS key policy.
- `replica_policy` (String) Key policy applied to replica keys. Populated for multi-region primary keys.
- `replica_tags` (String) Tags applied to replica keys. Raw JSON string. Populated for multi-region primary keys.
- `rotation_period_in_days` (Number) Rotation period in days configured in AWS for this key.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags assigned to the AWS key.
- `valid_to` (String) Date the key material expires. Populated for EXTERNAL-origin keys with an expiry.
- `xks_key_configuration` (String) XKS key configuration details. Populated for keys in an external key store. Raw JSON string.

<a id="nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.aws_param.multi_region_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `multi_region_key_type` (String) Whether this is a PRIMARY or REPLICA multi-region key.
- `primary_key` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration--primary_key))
- `replica_keys` (Attributes Set) Set of replica key ARN and region pairs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration--replica_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration--primary_key"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.aws_param.multi_region_configuration.primary_key`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String) ARN of the primary key.
- `region` (String) Region of the primary key.


<a id="nestedatt--keys--aws_param--multi_region_configuration--replica_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.aws_param.multi_region_configuration.replica_keys`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String) ARN of the replica key.
- `region` (String) Region of the replica key.




<a id="nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.multi_region_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `multi_region_key_type` (String) Whether this key is PRIMARY or REPLICA.
- `primary_key` (Attributes) ARN and region of the primary key. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration--primary_key))
- `replica_keys` (Attributes Set) ARN and region of each replica key. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration--replica_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration--primary_key"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.multi_region_configuration.primary_key`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String) ARN of the primary key.
- `region` (String) Region of the primary key.


<a id="nestedatt--keys--multi_region_configuration--replica_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys.multi_region_configuration.replica_keys`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String) ARN of the replica key.
- `region` (String) Region of the replica key.
